question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis. It would be beneficial to include a brief outline of chapters to provide a clear structure.

question: Description
feedback: While the text provides some description of what each section will cover, it lacks specific details about the contents of each chapter. More detailed descriptions would help readers understand the scope and focus of each section.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be inferred from the text, but it is not clearly outlined. A more explicit presentation of the thesis structure would make it easier for readers to understand how the different sections relate to each other.
